title: Brief
description: Output of Phase 1 (Discovery). The agent fills every field before moving to Phase 2.

audience.description: Role + seniority + familiarity with the topic. Generic answers like 'executives' or 'stakeholders' are rejected.

purpose.description: What decision or action the audience should take after seeing this. Not 'inform them about X'.

key_message.description: One sentence. If the audience remembers nothing else, this is it.

must_include.description: Concrete data points, names, dates, claims that must appear.

assets_provided.description: Paths or identifiers of images/charts/tables the user supplied.

data_provided.description: Numbers, tables, sources for charts and KPIs. Free-form references.
